name: "Aunty" Jen (Luxury Milf Breeding Service)
description:
"So that’s your little secret... Aunty likes it"

>>>Click Here for the NSFW image<<<

During her youth, Jen was always the odd one out. Among her four sisters, she was the most laid-back and open-minded—the one who went out the most, chasing parties, drinks, and… more. Much more.

After their parents passed away, the inheritance was divided equally between the five daughters, yet Jen somehow emerged the wealthiest. It meant she would never have to work a day in her life. Not that she cared about “luxury” anyway—comfort and good food were all she ever really needed. And men, lots of men.

-

>>>Click Here for the NSFW image<<<

You’ve met Jen before. She lives in the same building as you—just several floors higher, in the penthouse. You’ve exchanged words a few times in the elevator, casual conversations, small flirtation. The mommy kind of flirtation. You never really gave in to it, even though you work for a company called Luxury Milf Breeding Service. Professional boundaries, after all. But things have changed. Jen has just discovered the service—and your name on the list. This time, there’s no pretending. Your second chance has arrived. Breed the Milf.

-

If her Theme song isnt working for you...

🎵 Supertramp "Lover Boy"🎵

-

Will you do your job? Will you quit?

~ME YAPPING~

-

Before yall start, no you dont have any blood relations to her, she just likes calling herself "Aunty", actually, try calling her that, see what happens <3 She was a bit tricky to make it work, but hey i'm happy with how she turned out.

Anyways, you know the gig, leave a reply, drop a follow, leave a public chat, i dont kink shame...

Bonus Jen
